title: Rebuild of Evangelion 222 Collectible Cards by Bandai
display_title: Rebuild of Evangelion 222 Collectible Cards by Bandai
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild of Evangelion 2.22 Collectible Cards by Bandai             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Dec 11, 2010 3:53 am Does somebody here collect them? Are there any scans of the full sets available online? Here´s my Kaworu and the packaging, for reference. (I already ate the wafer, it tastes very very expensive and overpriced.) Insert ad: (Both are holographic.)

[]:             Quote Post by Daboke » Mon Dec 20, 2010 7:49 am Hey ...late reply. I'm a big collector of the wafer cards (got fat in the process) past and present.... and future I have all these Chap.01 cards except C-6 to C9. They stopped selling them at my local convenience stores so will have to search second hand stores or take a trip to Tokyo. The following website has scans of all the cards since the 90's. http://www.shokuganhonpo.com/ Let me know if you need any scans of the backs as that site doesn't do them.

Article: Rebuild of Evangelion 222 Collectible Cards by Bandai
[]: Rebuild of Evangelion 2.22 Collectible Cards by Bandai             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Dec 11, 2010 3:53 am Does somebody here collect them? Are there any scans of the full sets available online? Here´s my Kaworu and the packaging, for reference. (I already ate the wafer, it tastes very very expensive and overpriced.) Insert ad: (Both are holographic.)

[]:             Quote Post by Daboke » Mon Dec 20, 2010 7:49 am Hey ...late reply. I'm a big collector of the wafer cards (got fat in the process) past and present.... and future I have all these Chap.01 cards except C-6 to C9. They stopped selling them at my local convenience stores so will have to search second hand stores or take a trip to Tokyo. The following website has scans of all the cards since the 90's. http://www.shokuganhonpo.com/ Let me know if you need any scans of the backs as that site doesn't do them.
